description: Held-out anti-memorization contrast for benchmark calibration: compare CD14 monocytes at R+45 versus L-44 using the same preprocessing, annotation, and DE thresholds as the main rubric.
rationale: The original paper emphasizes immediate post-flight signatures and recovery dynamics but does not foreground this exact contrast. It is close enough to the published design to be biologically plausible while remaining unsuitable for direct memorization from the paper text.

analysis_spec.required_method_family: paired pseudobulk differential expression with astronaut-level blocking and multiple-testing correction
analysis_spec.primary_test: paired contrast with astronaut as blocking factor

hidden_reference_generation.note: Populate numeric reference statistics after independent computation outside the agent-visible benchmark prompt.
